reasoning: The document has high overall text fidelity, but programmatic analysis identified three major structural and accessibility defects. Header/footer text was inappropriately retained in the main content across all five pages, roman numeral lists were misclassified as alphabetical, and an image has truncated alternative text. With 3 major defects, the document must be routed to HUMAN_REVIEW.

concerns.description:
Header/footer elements retained in output (5): State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Mana; Meeting Officer’s Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification; Meeting Officer’s Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=5, pages_affected=5/5. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

concerns.description: Lists converted incorrectly: 2 ordered list(s) rendered as alphabetical (A, B, C) but contain roman numeral markers (I, II, III) — e.g. "II. March 16, 2016 Public Meeting and Oral Comments Summary"; "II. Public Meeting Sign-in Forms"
concerns.analysis: roman_letter_confusion=2. The renderer misclassified roman numeral lists as alphabetical starting at letter 'I'. Item text retains original roman numerals alongside incorrect letter markers, breaking list semantics.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 1 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (1 truncated mid-sentence) — e.g. p1: "...radient from green on the left to dark blue on the"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=1 (truncated=1, placeholder=0, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.

The source document uses bold and underlined text to emphasize the topic keywords at the beginning of list items (e.g., 'Excavation', 'Groundwater Assessments', 'Well Testing'). The extraction output completely strips this emphasis formatting, rendering the text as plain string literals.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Excavation – Speakers requested that full excavation occur... [Excavation is bold and underlined]
concerns.output_quote: "text": "Excavation – Speakers requested that full excavation occur as quickly as possible..."

action_items: Remove retained header and footer text from the main HTML content
Fix ordered list semantics by changing alphabetical markers to roman numerals where applicable
Complete the truncated alt text for the identified image
Restore bold and underline formatting on list item keywords if necessary for emphasis
